About Me

Who am I?


I'm a passionate software developer and designer based in Seattle. With over 5 years of professional experience, I engineer pixel-perfect interactive web apps that aren't just fast, but delightful to use.

My approach focuses on creating robust systems using clean code while prioritizing responsive layouts and aesthetic micro-interactions.

What I Do

Web Development

Designing modern, responsive, and robust web applications with full responsiveness and clean codebase structures.

UI/UX Design

Constructing high-fidelity mockups, modern prototyping layouts, typography systems, and delightful user journeys.

Performance Audit

Optimizing bundle sizes, speeding up render indices, structuring caching layers, and resolving layout shifts.

SEO Optimization

Configuring metadata schemes, optimizing page indexation layout, structure markup, and visual assets load speeds.

Featured Projects

Luxury E-Commerce 3D Configurator

VS Jewelcast

A bespoke luxury e-commerce platform for custom jewelry design featuring dynamic metal pricing APIs, CAD customization modules, and high-end payment gateways.

Food Delivery System

An end-to-end food delivery marketplace featuring multi-vendor storefronts, real-time driver tracking, geolocation routing, and secure payment integrations.

Job Board Hiring Marketplace

Job Portal Application

A high-performance job marketplace offering transaction-based job packages, resume matching engines, recruiter dashboards, and candidate profiling tools.

Farmer's Trade

B2B Agri-Trade D2C Marketplace

Farmer's Trade

An organic agricultural e-commerce platform facilitating direct transactions between farmers and wholesale buyers with dynamic bidding and logistics management.
